name: John Bomboy
cooked: Awesome! I’ll try to take one of them apart again this weekend and get some raw photos of the chips and board with my actual camera rather than just my phone. Since I have two now, I won’t be quite as skittish as I was the first time. After that I’ll start looking up datasheets and hyper link everything here.
